enforcement: api.php compares token age and permits legacy refresh window
current_effect: Global SSO token lifetime in hours; not PHP session timeout

enforcement: Expired tokens are marked inactive while session lists are read
current_effect: Expiry cleanup is access-driven, not an immediate global sweep

current_effect: Changing 1 to 0 does not immediately revoke existing tokens

enforcement: OTP email is sent only when value is 1
current_effect: Controls password-reset delivery only; not login MFA or Admin 2FA

enforcement: Session cleared after more than 1800 seconds idle
Session cleared after more than 28800 seconds absolute age
